Operation 'getRoute' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Get Route' is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (coordinate format, mode parameter), expected outputs (distance, duration, directions), and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies coordinate systems, routing modes, return values, and clarifies this is a read-only operation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Calculate a route between two points in Singapore with support for driving, walking, cycling, and public transport modes.
data.summary_suggestion: Calculate route with multiple transport modes
data.description_suggestion: Calculate an optimal route between two coordinates in Singapore. Supports multiple routing modes: driving, walking, cycling, and public transport. Requires start and end coordinates (in WGS84 or SVY21 format) and a routing mode parameter. Returns the calculated route with distance, duration, and turn-by-turn directions. No state changes occur.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Get Route' is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (coordinate format, mode parameter), expected outputs (distance, duration, directions), and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies coordinate systems, routing modes, return values, and clarifies this is a read-only operation for better AI agent decision-making.

Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and how this operation relates to other theme operations. Enhanced version clarifies the return structure, explains the operation's role in theme discovery, and notes authentication requirements for AI agent workflow planning.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of all available themed data layers and their details.
data.summary_suggestion: List all available themed data layers
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve metadata for all available themed data layers in OneMap. Returns a list of theme objects containing theme identifiers, names, descriptions, and availability information. This operation helps discover which themed datasets are available for querying via the retrieveTheme endpoint. No authentication required.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Get All Themes Info' is vague and not action-oriented. Description lacks specificity about what details are returned and how this operation relates to other theme operations. Enhanced version clarifies the return structure, explains the operation's role in theme discovery, and notes authentication requirements for AI agent workflow planning.

message: Operation 'retrieveTheme' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'theme' means in context. Enhanced version explains the relationship to getAllThemesInfo, specifies required parameters, describes return structure, and clarifies pagination support for better AI agent understanding of data retrieval workflow.

data.current_description: Retrieve location data for a specific theme.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve location data for specific theme
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve location data for a specific themed dataset. Requires a theme identifier (obtained from getAllThemesInfo) and optional filtering parameters. Returns a collection of location features with their coordinates, properties, and attributes relevant to the selected theme. Supports pagination for large result sets. No state changes occur.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't clarify what 'theme' means in context. Enhanced version explains the relationship to getAllThemesInfo, specifies required parameters, describes return structure, and clarifies pagination support for better AI agent understanding of data retrieval workflow.

data.current_description: Retrieve the address of a location by providing SVY21 X and Y coordinates.
